message: Running Goose: Executing tasks including Monetization Link Injection completion and 5-Star Rating System Implementation.
objective: Draft an affiliate blog post for 'Best Zero-Gravity Chairs for Back Pain 2024'. Create separate modules for 'Market Research', 'SEO Copywriting', and 'Monetization Link Injection'. Ensure we include a 5-star rating for each product and an affiliate disclosure.
history: State: PLANNING - Specification created. Moving to planning...

tasks.title: Market Research
tasks.description: Conduct detailed market analysis to identify top-performing zero-gravity chairs as of 2024. Evaluate ergonomics, customer reviews, and pricing. Compile a list of at least 10 chairs to be included in the blog post.

tasks.title: SEO Copywriting
tasks.description: Develop content that targets high-traffic keywords related to zero-gravity chairs and back pain relief. Include meta descriptions and appropriate headings (H1, H2, etc.). Structure content to be engaging and informative.

tasks.title: Monetization Link Injection
tasks.description: Integrate affiliate links seamlessly within the blog content. Ensure links lead to reputable retail platforms offering affiliate programs. Maintain transparency with readers by providing an affiliate disclosure.

tasks.title: 5-Star Rating System Implementation
tasks.description: Implement a 5-star rating system for each recommended product, clearly displayed alongside each chair review.

tasks.title: Affiliate Disclosure Section
tasks.description: Add an affiliate disclosure section at the beginning or end of the post to inform readers of the affiliate nature of the links.

tasks.title: Draft Blog Post and SEO Optimization
tasks.description: Create a draft of the affiliate blog post following the specified structure and including all required components. Ensure the content is SEO-optimized and ready for publication.
